untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 12-month time series momentum calculation across multiple asset classes with custom lookback periods. The allowed indicator set does not include a multi-period returns aggregator or cross-asset momentum composite indicator. Native 12-month momentum requires either a custom 252-bar return calculation or an external momentum indicator not in the allowed list.
translation_notes: Approximated using log_returns sign as proxy for momentum direction, but this reflects recent returns only, not 12-month lookback. True implementation requires: (1) ability to calculate 12-month rolling returns per instrument, (2) cross-asset class aggregation logic, (3) monthly rebalance timer. Recommend implementing as custom indicator in backtest engine or using external momentum calculation before feeding to rule engine.
